queries.q: Create a product persona for our power users in the analytics module
Design and engineering keep arguing about who we're building for; produce a behavior-grounded profile we can put in front of every tradeoff discussion
queries.notes: Intent-only ask; tradeoff framing is a listed use case

queries.q: Generate a marketing persona for the mid-market buyer of our security platform
Build a buyer persona for the GTM team, with assumptions and confidence levels labeled so we can review them
Before I draft the PRD I want the user profile nailed down: goals, behaviors, frustrations, and real quotes
Turn last quarter's research into an evidence-calibrated persona for the onboarding squad
Make a persona for first-time admins setting up our workspace product
Marketing needs a persona to aim the launch messaging at; ground it in the survey data we already have
Stress-test our pricing decision against a realistic profile of our typical small-team customer
queries.notes: Intent-only ask; stress-testing decisions is a listed use case

queries.q: I need a persona artifact for the design sprint next week, product mode, with explicit assumptions
I care less about who the customer is and more about what they're hiring the product to do; map the job, not the person
queries.notes: Job context rather than the person, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Profile the internal stakeholders on this project: who they are, their influence, and their concerns
queries.notes: Internal stakeholders, not customers, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Synthesize these twelve user interview transcripts into themes before we do anything else
queries.notes: Raw interviews need synthesis first; discover-interview-synthesis territory

queries.q: Write the problem statement for why trial users churn in week one
Draft the PRD for the team-permissions feature
Build an opportunity solution tree under our activation outcome
Debug this CSS grid layout that breaks only on Safari
Write a SQL query segmenting users by feature adoption
Book travel for the user-research field visits in Denver
Run a competitive analysis of persona-building tools on the market
queries.notes: Contains 'persona' but is a discover-phase research ask
